title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
